bird.name: Stephen's lorikeet
bird.summary: Stephen's lorikeet (Vini stepheni), also known as the Henderson lorikeet or the Henderson Island Lorikeet, is a species of parrot in the fa…

relations.subject: Stephen's lorikeet
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and the accidental introduction of predators to the island
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Stephen's lorikeet
relations.evidence: Due to their extremely limited range, the main threat to the survival of the lorikeets is the accidental introduction of predators to Henderson Island and habitat loss due to deforestation or natural disasters
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
